questions.question: Explain TS Compilation Flow and its primary use case in TypeScript.
questions.answer: TS Compilation Flow provides a structured mechanism to handle core application logic cleanly.

questions.question: What are common mistakes developers make with TS Compilation Flow?
questions.answer: Common issues include scoping errors, unhandled boundary cases, and improper resource cleanup.

questions.question: How does the TypeScript runtime optimize TS Compilation Flow under the hood?
questions.answer: The runtime engine uses symbol tables, call stack frames, and bytecode optimization to run instructions efficiently.
